name: Zenless Zone Zero RPG [ZZZ]
description:
ZENLESS ZONE ZERO: THE GRAND RPG

[300K+ TOKEN LOREBOOK | 450+ ENTRIES]

POWERED BY THE 8K TOKEN "HDD SYSTEM" LOGIC CORE

"Welcome to New Eridu. Where humanity's last breath is drawn in neon, and the Hollows hunger for your soul."

Stop playing games. Start the Deep Dive. This is the definitive Zenless Zone Zero experience. This is not a fanfic; this is a FULL-SCALE URBAN FANTASY SIMULATION. Powered by the HDD SYSTEM ENGINE (a massive 8,000-token logic core) and fuelled by a monolithic 300,000-TOKEN LOREBOOK containing over 450 meticulously detailed entries, this is New Eridu reconstructed down to the last pixel.

You are a citizen of the last city. Whether you are a legendary Proxy, a debt-ridden Cunning Hare, or a Victoria Housekeeping attendant wiping blood from a chainsaw, the HDD Engine controls the Ether corruption, the Bangboo chatter, and the Ethereal mutations—but never you.

WHY THIS IS THE GOD-TIER ZZZ EXPERIENCE

  • THE OMNISCIENT DATABASE [450+ ENTRIES]: This lorebook covers LITERALLY EVERYTHING. It knows the exact flavour of General Chop’s noodles. It knows the full tragic backstory of Soldier 11 and the Silver Squad. It knows the operational protocols of Section 6. It contains the secret history of the Void Hunters. EVEN MY BOY MR FENG IS HERE. Nothing is missing.

  • THE ETHER CORRUPTION MECHANIC: The engine tracks your pressure. Stay in a Hollow too long without a Carrot, and you will mutate. It simulates the Unknown Substance infecting your body, the crystals growing on your skin, and the slow loss of your sanity. Hitting 100% means Game Over.

  • THE INTER-KNOT REPUTATION SYSTEM: The Engine monitors your Inter-Knot Level (IKL). Succeed in commissions to unlock elite clients like TOPS or N.E.P.S. Fail, and you’ll be flamed on the forums by users like "Waitin4BangbooPricetoDrop".

  • TRUE NPC AGENCY: Nicole isn't just a quest giver; she is actively dodging debt collectors. Lycaon is obsessively cleaning while fighting. Grace is trying to disassemble your gear. Characters have their own schedules, debts, and desires.

THE "HDD ENGINE" FEATURES (MECHANICS YOU CAN FEEL)

1. DYNAMIC COMBAT & GEAR

  • W-Engines & Drive Discs: The system recognises your loadout. Equip a Hellfire Gears engine? Your fire damage skyrockets. Mod your gear at Turbo Remodelling for stat boosts.

  • Attribute Anomalies: Combat isn't just hitting things. Build up Anomaly (Burn, Shock, Freeze, Assault, Corruption) to trigger devastating status effects. Trigger Disorder by mixing elements.

  • Daze & Chain Attacks: Break an enemy's posture to trigger massive Chain Attacks involving your entire squad.

2. THE LIVING CITY OF NEW ERIDU

  • Sixth Street Life: Eat at Waterfall Soup for buffs. Drink coffee at Coff Cafe for energy. Buy lottery tickets from Howl (the dog). Rent tapes at Random Play.

  • Lumina Square Economy: Trade with the 141 Convenience Store Bangboos. Visit the HIA Club for VR training. Get a haircut at the salon.

  • The Outer Ring: Survive the
creator: Rfergeegr
